rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Tests live co-located next to route files as route.test.ts, not in a separate __tests__ dir.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Response envelope is always { success, data } or { success: false, error: string } — never raw throw/catch.","scope":"API routes"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When implementing a submit endpoint, validate existence first (404), then business rules (400), then duplicates (409), before creating (201). Order matters for correct error precedence.","scope":"API routes"}]}
